name: agent-cowork
description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering three areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support); (3) agent context handoff brief generation — handoff (ephemeral brief Markdown for cross-agent or cross-teammate task transfer).
